title: Badgley Mischka Pleated Draped Gown in Blue
description: Please read carefully: this is a gorgeous gown originally a size 8. It was altered for a client who was a size 8 for the top (bust area) but a size 4 around the hips. The gown is brand new still with the tags. It’s lovely but it needs someone size 8 for the bust area and size 4 for the hip area.
